messages.content:
To persist the state of your Project CCC project to facilitate the next session, I will prepare the necessary persistent files.

**Session State to be handed off:**

*   **`.ccc/state.md`**: Contains current configuration and handoff instructions.
*   **`SKILL.md`**: The master prompt for the CCC system.
*   **`skills/ccc-<role>/SKILL.md`**: The updated skill files for all 7 active roles.
*   **`references/red-lines.md`**: The engineering discipline constraints.
*   **`references/board-task-schema.md`**: The data contract for tasks.
*   **`plans/<plan-name>/plan.md`**: Kept only if no data was modified.
*   **`templates/`**: Kept only if new templates were added.
*   **`scripts/`**: Kept only if new CLI tools were added.
*   **`test/`**: Kept only if test suite was added.

We will remove:
*   **Scratchpads**, **Temporary Plan Logs**, and **Workspace Files** directly in the project root.

Proceed to persist the current state? (yes/no)
